title: Texas Property Tax Relief and Reform Act
summary: Comprehensive property tax reform bill that increases the homestead exemption, compresses school district tax rates, and strengthens appraisal caps for residential and agricultural property.
eastTexasImpact: Directly reduces property tax bills for East Texas homeowners, ranchers, and farmers. The increased homestead exemption and agricultural appraisal protections are especially impactful in rural East Texas counties.
